task_completion.description: The title 'Susan B. Anthony Papers' is centered, bolded, and >=16pt font size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the top of the document, the text 'Susan B. Anthony Papers' should be aligned to the center, have a bold weight, and appear visibly larger than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Heading 1 style is applied to the main sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sections 'Collection Summary', 'Administrative Information', 'Biographical Note', 'Scope and Content Note', 'Subject Terms', and 'Container List' should be formatted distinctly as main headings (e.g., larger font, bolded, and matching each other in style).

task_completion.description: Heading 2 style is applied to the series sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sections 'Series I: Correspondence', 'Series II: Diaries', 'Series III: Speeches and Writings', and 'Series IV: Miscellany' should be formatted as subheadings, distinct from both the H1 headings and the regular body text.

Look at the narrative paragraphs (e.g., starting with 'Susan Brownell Anthony was...', 'In 1851...', 'The papers of...'). Both the left and right edges of these text blocks should be straight and flush with the margins.

task_completion.description: Subject terms are formatted as a bulleted list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Subject Terms' heading, the terms 'African Americans--Civil rights' and 'New York (State)--History' must have bullet points preceding them.

task_completion.description: The pipe-separated container list is replaced with a 4-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Container List' heading, there should be a visible grid/table with exactly 4 columns. The raw pipe-separated text (e.g., text with '|' characters) should no longer be visible.

task_completion.description: The header row of the container list table is bolded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top row of the newly created table, containing the words 'Box', 'Folder', 'Contents', and 'Dates', must be formatted in bold text.

task_completion.description: The document is saved after formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words window title or tab should not display an asterisk (*) or 'modified' indicator next to the filename, or there should be a screenshot showing the agent clicking the 'Save' icon or triggering the save action.

integrity.description: The agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Calligra Words open with the document being edited, including visible use of formatting toolbars, menus, or dialog boxes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands (like sed, awk, pandoc, or python scripts) manipulating the 'sba_finding_aid.odt' file directly to apply formatting or insert tables.

integrity.description: The table was created using the word processor's table feature, not simulated with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The container list table should have visible cell boundaries, gridlines, or table-specific UI handles typical of a Calligra Words table, rather than just text aligned with whitespace.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document title is 'Susan B. Anthony Papers'. The H1 sections are: 'Collection Summary', 'Administrative Information', 'Biographical Note', 'Scope and Content Note', 'Subject Terms', and 'Container List'. The H2 sections are: 'Series I: Correspondence', 'Series II: Diaries', 'Series III: Speeches and Writings', and 'Series IV: Miscellany'. The table headers must be 'Box', 'Folder', 'Contents', and 'Dates'. The exact subject terms to look for in the bulleted list are 'African Americans--Civil rights' and 'New York (State)--History'. Sample body paragraphs to check for justified alignment begin with 'Susan Brownell Anthony was...', 'In 1851...', and 'The papers of...'.
